overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit covered walkways, digital billboards, passing vehicles, and a distinctive green six-wheeled car. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-quality rendered graphics with atmospheric neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath glowing digital billboards and neon overhead structures

entered.detail: metal framework with glowing yellow and orange neon tube lights forming a covered walkway roof
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements and video content on building facades
silver metal barriers separating the orange-textured sidewalk from the multi-lane road
wet reflective multi-lane street with moving traffic and lane markings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic covered sidewalk with distinctive orange textured pavement, surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon overhead structures. Vehicles pass by on the wet multi-lane road to the left, separated by metal guardrails, while the ambient lighting creates a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with parked futuristic vehicle and construction barriers

events.description: a large green six-wheeled futuristic car comes into close view parked on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked green car and approaching the intersection corner

notable_agents.action: green six-wheeled car with white roof parked on the sidewalk next to construction barriers

entered.detail: distinctive green six-wheeled vehicle with chrome details and white roof parked on the sidewalk
red and white striped plastic barriers lining the right side of the walkway
high-rise building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing a distinctive green six-wheeled car parked on the right, with red and white construction barriers lining the sidewalk. The overhead covered structure ends, revealing more of the dark sky above as the camera nears the intersection corner with tall glass buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between cyberpunk high-rises with neon signage

events.description: turning right at the corner into a darker narrow street between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and proceeding down the narrow side street toward the green car

entered.detail: confined passage between tall buildings with wet pavement and scattered debris
glowing purple and white neon signage on building walls ahead
the same green six-wheeled vehicle now viewed from the front as the camera approaches down the side street

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the corner into a darker, narrower alleyway between towering cyberpunk buildings. The green car is visible ahead from a new angle, while purple neon signs illuminate the confined space. The main street traffic and construction barriers are left behind as the camera enters the more enclosed urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, neon-lit main thoroughfare into the claustrophobic depths of a dark urban alley. It begins along a covered sidewalk with orange textured pavement, moving past towering digital billboards and vehicles gliding across a wet multi-lane road. As the camera advances, it passes a distinctive green six-wheeled car parked beside red and white construction barriers, while the overhead shelter ends to reveal the dark night sky. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at a corner, leaving the main street traffic behind to enter a narrower canyon of towering glass buildings. Finally, the environment transforms into a confined space illuminated by purple neon signs, with the green car appearing once more from a new angle deep within the alley.
